text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 
44 
MDCD_OT_TOTAL_USE 
LABEL: 
Medicaid Use (Claim Count) — Other Services 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the total count of Medicaid other services (OT) (header) claims for the beneficiary after 
removing the managed care capitated payments. 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Other Services Claims file (derived) 
VALUES: 
XX 
COMMENT: 
CCW filtered the OT claims header records to distinguish between capitated payments
